ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-28-2008 IN 206, PLAINTIFF OTIS CORTHELL'S MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL, AND EXTENDING DISCOVERY CUTOFF GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36 (A). THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 12/15/08 AT 11:15 AM IN DEPARTMENT 206. PLAINTIFF COUNSEL TO CONTACT DEPARTMENT 220 FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE DATES AND SEND SENT NOTICE TO ALL PARTIES. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. GENERAL ORDER 140 REGARDING MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS SO ORDERED. (SEE 8/28/08 MINUTES FOR FURTHER RULING) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: SCOTT HUGHES CSR# 12365 (D206)
